Music

After the Wind   acousmatic 2019
Premiered on CIM (Círculo de Invenção Musical) concert on October 18, 2019, in Curitiba.

the composer lost himself by this space
slowly walking after the wind
attentive to the broken sidewalk tiles
and carried these sounds to here like one who carries water
every portion in a sieve




Peça 2  
Premiered Premiered

score
